data.title: MSC Income Fund Announces Completion of $150.0 Million Investment Grade Notes Offering
data.description: Houston based company MSC Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: MSIF) recently completed a private notes offering, raising a total of $150.0 million. The unsecured Notes will bear fixed interest and have an aggregate principal amount of $150.0 million. This successful offering demonstrates confidence in MSC Income's financial standing and future outlook.

data.title: Lowrider Stamps Cruising Into a Post Office Near You
data.description: Today, in San Diego on March 13, 2026, the U.S. Postal Service conducted a special ceremony at the Logan Heights Library to mark the debut of its new Lowriders stamps. These stamps honor the vibrant lowrider car culture, which has deep ties to the Mexican American/Chicano communities. The stamps will be available for purchase starting today, showcasing the creativity and significance of lowriders in American society.

data.title: What Industry Disruption? Zillow Has Durable Software, Data Moat: Bullish Analyst Says
data.description: In the past month, Zillow Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: Z) disclosed its fourth-quarter revenue at $654 million, slightly exceeding the estimated figure of $650.29 million. The adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at 39 cents, slightly lower than the anticipated 40 cents. Furthermore, the company unveiled a $1.25 billion share repurchase initiative, leading to a surge in the stock price. Subsequent to the earnings report, numerous analysts modified their price targets for Zillow. JPMorgan maintained an Overweight rating on Zillow stock, with an $84 price target. Analyst Dae K Lee cited concerns over artificial intelligence disruption, regulatory oversight, legal challenges, and market trends impacting recent stock fluctuations.

data.title: 2026 universal registration document with annual financial report now available from Societe Generale. #finance
data.description: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has increased by 2%, reaching a total of 8.5%. This rise in unemployment has been primarily attributed to the economic downturn caused by the global pandemic. The report also highlights that the number of people seeking unemployment benefits has surged to 3.5 million, signifying the severe impact on the job market. Additionally, it was noted that the current job market conditions are the toughest seen in recent years, with various sectors facing layoffs and hiring freezes. Experts suggest that immediate government intervention and support for industries are crucial to stabilize the economy and combat the rising unemployment rates.

data.title: PeopleGrove Redefines Teacher Education Program Support with Responsible AI, Native Video Functionality, and Intuitive Design
data.description: In Warwick, Rhode Island, PeopleGrove, a top SaaS platform for experiential learning and engagement in higher education, has unveiled enhancements to its CORE for Education product suite. The updated features offer native field encounter videos, improved digital binders, and integrated competency management using responsible AI. CORE by PeopleGrove combines video content, advanced placement coordination, and competency insights into a cohesive platform. This update marks a significant advancement in offering comprehensive tools for educational institutions.

data.description: The non-profit organization aims to enhance the decentralization of Ethereum to a level where it could continue to operate effectively even without the foundation's presence.
